commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=03e5265633ff0bf02c891dbfefffa37c0f00d136)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a pre-catalog lean-mode filter helper, uses it before Code Mode/Tool Search compaction, adds focused unit coverage, and updates local-model lean docs.

PR surface: Source +18, Tests +52, Docs 0. Total +70 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main applies `filterLocalModelLeanTools` before catalog compaction, so the denied tools cannot be placed behind Code Mode or Tool Search controls. I did not run a live local-model reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This draft maintainer-labeled PR needs human review and validation rather than ClawSweeper cleanup or branch replacement.

target.title: fix(agents): keep lean tools behind catalog controls
target.body:
Summary:
- Keep `localModelLean` from removing heavyweight tools before Code Mode or Tool Search can place them behind compact catalog controls.
- Preserve the final visible lean-mode filter, so `browser`, `cron`, and `message` stay out of the model-visible schema when lean mode is on.
- Add focused coverage for pre-catalog vs final visible filtering and update local-model docs.

Verification:
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
- `node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`

Behavior addressed: lean local-model runs no longer lose policy-allowed `browser`, `cron`, and `message` capability when compact catalog controls are enabled.
Real environment tested: local source checkout for diff/doc sanity; Crabbox/Testbox proof attempted but blocked by runner/auth state.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`; `node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`.
Evidence after fix: diff check passed with no whitespace errors; docs formatter reported `Docs formatting clean (647 files)`.
Observed result after fix: model-visible lean filtering remains documented and final-filtered, while pre-catalog tools are preserved for compact controls.
What was not tested: Vitest and `check:changed` did not complete. Local Vitest in this Codex worktree repeatedly pegged the Node 26 Vitest child with no reporter output; `pnpm docs:list` and the commit hook tried to run `pnpm install` and aborted with `ERR_PNPM_ABORTED_REMOVE_MODULES_DIR_NO_TTY`; Blacksmith Testbox was unavailable because `blacksmith auth login` is required; raw AWS Crabbox leases `cbx_4278a919f2b8` / `run_2397a3193b5b` and `cbx_49dde952d64a` / `run_c379a6a0f772` were stopped after producing no useful test output.

Related to https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599.
target.author: vincentkoc
